headline: Scotiabank Raises its Price Target on Simon Property Group (SPG)
summary: Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In. On May 19, 2026, Scotiabank raised the firm’s price target on Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) to $206 from $192 and maintained a Sector Perform rating on the shares. Scotiabank said it was updating price targets for U.S. Retail […]
